title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions:
Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation Ventures Solutions!
